identify_cve.expected_solution: Agent must identify the CVE as CVE-2021-3749 (GHSA-cph5-m8f7-6c5x) affecting the npm package `axios` at versions < 0.21.2, fixed in 0.21.2. The BLAST_RADIUS.md report should name the CVE identifier explicitly and the vulnerable version range.
evaluation_criteria: Names the CVE identifier CVE-2021-3749 verbatim
Cites the vulnerable version range < 0.21.2 (and/or fixed version 0.21.2)

find_direct_deps.expected_solution: Agent must enumerate the direct dependents of `axios` inside the workspace repos. Per ground_truth, these are: grafana and druid-web-console. The answer must reference each by package name and cite the manifest file (e.g. package.json, go.mod, requirements.txt, pom.xml) where the dependency is declared.
evaluation_criteria: Lists each ground-truth direct dependent: grafana and druid-web-console
References the manifest file(s) where the dependency is declared (package.json / go.mod / requirements.txt / pom.xml / Cargo.toml as applicable)
Distinguishes runtime vs dev/test dependencies for `axios` where the manifest type indicates it

trace_transitive_paths.expected_solution: Agent must trace transitive dependency paths through intermediaries. Per ground_truth: axios -> grafana-plugin-sdk -> grafana-plugins; axios -> druid-web-console -> druid. The dependency_chain detail is: axios -> grafana (dependency (frontend plugins)) via package.json; affected_versions=< 0.21.2; axios -> apache/druid (dependency (web-console)) via web-console/package.json; affected_versions=< 0.21.2. The answer must show at least one A -> B -> C path that explains how a downstream consumer pulls in `axios` indirectly.
evaluation_criteria: Documents at least one transitive path of the form A -> B -> C through `axios`
Names every intermediary package present in the ground_truth transitive_paths (druid-web-console and grafana-plugin-sdk)
Distinguishes direct from transitive dependents in the report

version_analysis.expected_solution: Agent must classify each consumer as affected or unaffected based on the resolved/pinned `axios` version. The vulnerable range is < 0.21.2; the fix landed in 0.21.2. The answer must explicitly call out the version each consumer pins (from package-lock.json / yarn.lock / go.sum / Pipfile.lock / Cargo.lock as applicable) and decide affected vs not.
evaluation_criteria: States the vulnerable range < 0.21.2 and the fixed version 0.21.2
Classifies at least one consumer as affected or not affected based on its pinned/resolved version
References a lockfile or resolution manifest as the source of the pinned version
